styles.container: max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 30px 34px; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #1f2933; line-height: 1.72; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d9e2ec; border-radius: 18px;
styles.title: margin: 0 0 24px; font-size: 38px; line-height: 1.16; font-weight: 700; color: #102a43;
styles.image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
styles.row_wrapper: margin: 26px 0; display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: stretch;
styles.row_image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
styles.float_left: float: left; width: 40%; max-width: 340px; margin: 8px 20px 12px 0; display: block; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
styles.float_right: float: right; width: 40%; max-width: 340px; margin: 8px 0 12px 20px; display: block; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
